notes: lint script is an alias for tsc --noEmit — type-check gate already covers it (type-check also checks src/ui).
build = tsup + UI build; UI build requires src/ui dependencies (build:ui runs npm ci there first).
SQLite WAL lock: agent-tasks/.index.db is held by any live mcp-agent-tasks server — never git checkout/reset across branches here on Windows (use worktrees).
